programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: Agents Sam and Mark pursue a debt from a man who owes nearly £5k in legal fees. In London, Vlad must recover nearly £35k in unpaid rent - but the debtor lives in Dubai.
A traveller's account of being robbed at gunpoint turns out to be a lie. When a man's cellar floods with raw sewage the smell of fraud is unmistakable.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
The friends stay at a beach house. Phoebe meets someone who knows her family, and Rachel expresses her jealousy of Ross's girlfriend.
The Yorkshire Vet follows all the drama, laughter and tears as a group of town and country vets, at three different practices across the county, help animals of all kinds.
The Yorkshire Vet follows all the drama, laughter and tears as a group of town and country vets at three different practices across the county help animals of all kinds.
Another chance to see some of the vets' best cases as they attempt to help all creatures great and small.

...Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles. From the misty mountains of Sa Pa to the jam-packed city of Hanoi, Nick discovers a Vietnam that is developing fast and thriving. (VS) (Ep3)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Paddington is given a metal detector by Mr Gruber, and thinks he has found something, and wonders if it is lost pirate treasure or a rusty bottle cap. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Holly and Ben help the Wise Old Elf play a trick on Nanny Plum. She doesn't see the funny side, so decides to turn him into a giant snail! (VS)
The Power Cut: When a power cut plunges their house into darkness, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.
Bouncy Ball: George feels left out when Peppa and Suzy Sheep start playing tennis.
When Fluff gets covered in chocolate spread, Tweedy accidentally discovers that a little tender loving care is the best way to get a mucky Fluff washed!
When Squiggle doesn't have anything to do in the treehouse, Fluff and Nok-nok tell him about the importance of staying healthy. Squiggle and friends create a fun keep-fit routine.
...Big Adventures! Emily gets her wish for an adventure when she is asked to take the Sodor Rangers up to Callan Castle...
Charlie and Bronwyn take the kids on a sailing lesson, but Charlie feels upstaged by Peter and a seagull. Trying to win back the kids' attention, Charlie ends up sinking the boat.
Peppa and George look at the stars with Mummy and Daddy Pig.
Paddington hurts his knee & goes to see Dr Yasmin. When she steps out, he steps UP and is mistaken for a doctor.
When Posy congratulates Pip on some chalk drawings in the park, he takes the credit rather than admit they aren't his. But who is the mystery artist?
Mayor Humdinger's garbage-compacting truck is messing up the beach. It's up to Rocky to help save a rescue.
Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.
With the building work complete, it's time to decorate! Peppa and George have fun choosing how to decorate their new attic bedrooms. It's dinosaurs for George, but what will Peppa pick?
Grandpa Pig and Grandad Dog are on their boats when Grandpa Pig drops an anchor on his foot! After an x-ray and plaster cast at the hospital, Grandpa Pig needs to stay overnight.
When a storm keeps the Rexes at home, they must think of a game to pass the time.
Grumblestunk is sure she saw an enormous banana when she walked Stink on the beach early that morning and Stan and Gran spy a mystery - but no banana!
...from Home. Mayor Humdinger takes his trailer and his kitties out for a vacation. But when his driving lands them at the tippy top of a tall spire, the PAW Patrol must rescue them.
When Milo, Lofty and Lark report into Mission Control they're soon on their way to the moon to save Mila's precious space strawberries!
King Thistle demands bread for his royal breakfast, but there is no flour to be found in the castle.
The playgroup is going on a trip to the museum. Everyone is on the bus ready to go, except Pedro Pony. Where is he?
Odo and Doodle are given the job of explaining an eclipse to the other campers, but when they accidentally forget, the other campers burst into pandemonium as the sun disappears.
Olivia learns about acid and alkali, when creating a secret message. (Ep3)
Jen tells a story in which Noah brings his favourite storybook to school - but all the characters escape, causing havoc! Will Noah be able to catch them all and read his book to class?
Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.
Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.
National and international news.
Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.
Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
After a passenger is murdered, the hunt for the truth leads deep into a web of deceit and desperation. And as Jack is drawn back in by the mystery, will he also rekindle his romance?
We visit Jenny, who turned to art therapy following a heart attack. Today she wants to spread the calming impact of art on children at her pebble decorating workshop.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
Expert Christopher Wren explains how otters were nearly wiped out in the 1970s and how, with volunteers, Gosforth Park in Newcastle has become a flourishing haven for these creatures.
Susan - with her camper van Helen - explores the rugged Ilkley Moor, the charming village of Upperthong, and Holmfirth - the setting of record-breaking sitcom Last of the Summer Wine.
Jeremy Vine hosts as team captains Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay are joined by model and entrepreneur Jodie Kidd and EastEnders legend Shaun Williamson.

programmes.show_name: New: Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time
programmes.show_description: Alice follows a cancer patient's treatment, while uncovering pioneering plastic surgery and stories of courage and innovation during the Plague and World War I. (Ep4)
With most leads on Peter's murder now exhausted, the sudden disappearance of a local boy ignites a new urgency, pulling the duo back into a desperate search. Sharon D Clarke stars.
Behind the surgeon's mask - from the pressurised operating theatre to life at home - as consultant heart surgeon Inder Birdi faces one of the most challenging cases of his career.
A window on to life-or-death incidents in the fast-paced world of the most specialised emergency first responders. Joiner John (60) suddenly collapses from a cardiac arrest.
A man arrives in theatre with agonising back pain and doctors suspect a cancerous tumour is compressing his spinal cord. He needs an urgent operation using a hi-tech robot to remove it. (Ep3)

Ross has to choose between Rachel and his current girlfriend. Phoebe thinks she may have found her real mother, and Monica is stung by a jellyfish.

Paddington plays a game with Jonathan and Judy in the park. When Matteo can't join in,  Paddington offers to look after the cafe. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: The king comes to visit. When Nanny accidentally shrinks all of the king's clothes, she magics some more from vegetables in the kitchen. (VS)
Daddy Pig's Birthday: Today is Daddy Pig's birthday, but he must go to work. While he is away, Mummy Pig, Peppa and George prepare a special birthday surprise.
Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house. The girls are too excited to go to sleep and stay up playing games and having fun.
Fluff is playing with a little soft thing and Tweedy isn't sure where Fluff got it from. Can he work it out and find a way to put it back where it belongs? (Ep11)
When Squiggle's flowers wilt in the treehouse, he visits Scratch and Badger to see if they might have any new ones. But the visit turns into a big sneezy affair!
...Big Adventures! While in China, Thomas is missing his best friend Percy. Hopefully the annual dragon boat race will cheer him up.
A 'pesky' mole causes trouble for Moose when the mole decides that Moose's Wild Man Golf course is the perfect place to build a few molehills.
Cold Winter's Day: Peppa and George go to the park to play. All the puddles have frozen over, so the two must think of other ways to entertain themselves.
Can Mr Brown's sleepover live up to Mrs Brown's high standard when Simi and Toq come to stay for the night?
Jamila throws a birthday party for Fishy, the Playing Spot fish, but Posy takes over, making it a Posy party.
A gift for the Princess has been scattered all over town. It's up to Rocky to put her gifts back together.
Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town.
Mr Zebra arrives with a new car seat for the baby! Excited to try it in the car, the family soon realise it won't fit with Peppa and George too. It's time for a new car!
Grandpa Pig found his night at the hospital so comfortable, he's reluctant to leave! Peppa and Suzy volunteers to nurse him at home and make sure he's as comfortable as in hospital.
Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar.
A giant albatross is seen near Porthole and Stan has to spot it! But the bird's footprints are bigger than any real albatross. What's going on?
Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois are observing a pair of mountain goats when a sudden avalanche strikes! The Paw Patrol must mount a mountain rescue and reunite the families.
Milo, Lofty and Lark are delighted to enter the Big Top to entertain the audience but poor Milo is upset when he thinks everyone is laughing at him.
Snobby King and Queen Marigold are coming to visit the Little Kingdom, so Holly and her parents enlist the elf band to impress them.
Peppa and Suzy have nothing to do, so Daddy Pig finds an old box of garden games. But not all the games are easy for George.
Odo spends the day with his dad and they discover a new way of playing the double bass that involves pinecones and lots of kicking.
Olivia makes a plate of pepper scatter in all directions, while learning about surface tension. (Ep4)
Join Kiera in the Story Den for a story about two best friends, Panda and Penguin, who find an exciting new thing to play with. But only one can play with it at a time...

Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
Jack and Kate are on the case after a rising film star is murdered at the Cannes premiere of her new movie with an infamous and outspoken director.
Line dancing teacher Nigel throws a beauty spa party with homemade avocado treatments. But will the partygoers leave with a youthful glow or a sour taste?
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
We join the marine conservation manager at Ulster Wildlife as his team deploys over 20,000 specially grown oysters into the sea this winter, re-introducing them to the area.
Susan explores the captivating landscapes of the Irish coast, touring the iconic Wild Atlantic Way, examining Ireland's rich folklore, and visiting a location used in Star Wars films.
Jeremy Vine is joined by captains Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay for a friendly hour of puzzle solving, joined by guests presenter Rav Wilding and comedian Shazia Mirza.
On the second leg of his adventure, Alexander visits Jaipur's Pink City with its dazzling Gem Palace, then heads south to explore silk in Karnataka and ventures in to tiger country. (Ep2/3)
Alex Polizzi visits a Suffolk village, coming to the rescue of a pair of publicans whose dream of running a pub is turning into a nightmare. Can Alex create a cosy country pub?
The disturbing story of 'Adam', the unknown boy whose dismembered body was found in the Thames in 2001, leading investigating officers around the world and into a dark world of the occult.
